title: Extract shared proxy + throttle logic into crawler_core.rs
description: Multiple crawlers (akson, stroylandia, glavsnab) duplicate ProxyPool, load_proxies, and throttle logic. Create a clean crawler_core module and refactor at least two crawlers to use it without breaking functionality.
verification_command: cargo check -p planly_gateway && echo 'Refactoring check passed (add real tests later)'
